title: ReputationAttestation
description: EAS attestation on Base (§5.1). minted_by is fixed to SettlementContract: params.identity.reputationMinter = "SettlementContract-only".

minted_by.description: Reputation attestations may only be minted by the canonical SettlementContract; no other minter is valid (§5.1, params.identity.reputationMinter).

uid.description: EAS attestation UID, populated once minted on-chain. Not enumerated in §5.1's 3-field list; included as optional realistic EAS envelope metadata.

data.description: Optional schema-specific attestation payload; shape depends on `schema` (deliberately open-ended, unlike every other object in this schema).
